description:
Create three new bibliographic items in Zotero (one Book, one Journal Article, and one Conference Paper) with the following metadata:

Book:
Title: The Structure of Scientific Revolutions
Author: Thomas S. Kuhn
Date: 1962
Publisher: University of Chicago Press
Place: Chicago

Journal Article:
Title: The Strength of Weak Ties
Author: Mark S. Granovetter
Date: 1973
Publication: American Journal of Sociology
Volume: 78
Issue: 6
Pages: 1360-1380

Conference Paper:
Title: The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine
Authors: Sergey Brin and Lawrence Page
Date: 1998
Proceedings Title: Proceedings of the 7th International World Wide Web Conference
Pages: 107-117
